tasks.subject: Task 0: Streaming providers + durable buffered fetcher
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Providers yield chunks; fetcher buffers per county and flushes (writes once) on success OR on Exception/KeyboardInterrupt, then re-raises.

**Files:** providers/base.py, providers/aqs.py, providers/purpleair.py, fetcher.py, tests/test_fetcher.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_fetcher.py tests/test_providers_purpleair.py tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/base.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "src/smoke_sense/fetcher.py", "tests/test_fetcher.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_fetcher.py tests/test_providers_purpleair.py tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider.fetch generator yielding non-empty chunks", "fetch_county writes once on success; flushes on Exception+KeyboardInterrupt then re-raises", "full suite passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Request logging with redaction + --verbose
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Log redacted provider HTTP requests + retries to stderr when -v/--verbose is set.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/logutil.py, tests/test_logutil.py; Modify providers/aqs.py, providers/purpleair.py, bin/fetch.py, tests/test_providers_aqs.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_logutil.py tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v` then `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/logutil.py", "tests/test_logutil.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "tests/test_providers_aqs.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_logutil.py tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["redact masks secrets, no mutation", "AQS _request logs without key/email", "_configure_logging toggles stderr INFO handler"]}
```
